review.title: Director Technology Transformation & Architecture
review.jd_text: JOB TITLE Director Technology Transformation and Architecture | MAF Global Solutions | Tech Role Summary The Director of Technology Transformation and Architecture at Group Technology leads the development of the group's transformation roadmap and manages the Enterprise Architecture landscape. They drive tech solutions, lead a team of architects and strategists, and pioneer GEN-AI solutions. ROLE PROFILE Technology Transformation: Provide a holistic view of the business and I&T environment, develop a roadmap to enhance digital maturity, and formulate strategies to drive the organization's digital business. Enterprise and Solution Architecture: Establish the Enterprise and Business architecture practice, improve alignment and agility, and manage the Enterprise Architecture activities for efficient business and IT operations. Innovation: Stay aware of I&T trends, identify innovation opportunities, and promote the business value of EA as a strategy enabler and technology innovation driver. Functional/Technical Competencies: Demonstrate experience in senior technology roles, strategic planning, program management, and Enterprise Architecture. Communication: Possess outstanding communication skills, with the ability to negotiate with and influence at senior leadership levels. Management Skills: Exhibit excellent management skills, with the ability to handle diverse components of multiple practices, teams, and programs concurrently. Organizational Savvy: Display organizational and political savvy, with the ability to navigate the personalities, obstacles, and politics of the organization. Technology Understanding: Have a deep understanding of current and emerging technologies and how they can be employed to drive digital business. Requirements 15 or more years of business experience in IT transformation, architecture or technology leadership. Master’s or bachelor’s degree in business, computer science, computer engineering, electrical engineering, system analysis or a related field of study, or equivalent experience. Certified in Architecture Frameworks; TOGAF, FEAF, DOD, Zachman. Certified Program/Project Management Professional. Deep knowledge of business ecosystems, SaaS, infrastructure as a service (IaaS), platform as a service (PaaS), SOA, APIs, open data, microservices, event-driven IT and predictive analytics. Deep understanding of information management practices, system development life cycle management, IT services management, agile and lean methodologies, infrastructure and operations, and EA and ITIL frameworks. What We Offer At Majid Al Futtaim, we’re on a mission to create great moments, to spread happiness, to build, experiences that stay in our memories for a lifetime. We’re proud to say that over the past 27 years, we have built a reputation as a regional market leader in what we do. Join us! Work in a friendly environment, where everyone shares positive vibes and excited about our future. Work with over 45,000 diverse and tale

review.title: CTO – Dubai – UAE-N/Arabic Speaker
review.jd_text: CTO – Dubai – UAE-N/Arabic Speaker Key Responsibilities Define and drive the company’s technology strategy, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives while identifying opportunities for innovation and operational efficiency. Lead the engineering function with a hands-on approach, including conducting architecture and code reviews, establishing technical standards, and making key build vs. buy decisions. Own and evolve the end-to-end technical architecture of the company’s products and platforms, including system design, technology stack selection, data architecture, and engineering best practices. Design, implement, and oversee robust security architecture across all products, including threat modeling, secure SDLC practices, penetration testing, and incident response planning. Stay abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends, leading research and development initiatives to evaluate and adopt new solutions that support business growth. Evaluate, select, and manage technology vendors and partners, including contract negotiation and performance management to ensure optimal value delivery. Oversee the technology budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources across strategic and operational initiatives while identifying cost optimization opportunities. Collaborate closely with executive leadership and cross-functional teams to align technology initiatives with business priorities, ensuring clear communication and stakeholder engagement. Ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and industry standards related to technology, data privacy, and information security, implementing policies to mitigate risk and maintain governance. Requirements Demonstrated hands-on experience in modern software development within the past 3–5 years. Strong ability to conduct code reviews and assess software architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability. Proven experience working with cloud-native architectures (AWS, Azure, or GCP), along with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Experience designing and developing APIs, microservices, and distributed systems in complex environments. Solid understanding of modern security engineering practices, extending beyond governance into implementation. Hands-on proficiency in at least one modern programming language, such as Python, Go, Java, or TypeScript. Candidates must have recent, practical experience in software development or system architecture within the last 5 years. Profiles lacking this will not be considered. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field; a Master’s degree is preferred. 20+ years of experience in senior technology leadership roles, with substantial hands-on expertise in software development and system architecture. Proven track record of driving technology innovation, including the design, development, and successful implementation of scalable solutions. Strong lead

review.title: Director Operations Middle East (m/f/d)
review.jd_text: WE LOVE AVIATION RH Aero Systems is setting the standard for aviation support equipment and services. Through our industry-leading businesses – Rhinestahl and HYDRO – we deliver capability across custom-designed Ground Support Equipment, OEM-licensed engine and airframe tooling, 26 global service centers, and innovative engineered solutions for OEMs, MROs, and Operators worldwide. Director Operations Middle East (m/f/d) YOUR TASKS Develop deep operational capabilities in the Middle East to support and grow the company’s expertise in the region and globally. Provide leadership to the teams to ensure product quality, reliability, and delivery of commitments on time and on budget. Oversee and expand service business in the region through operational efficiencies, on-time delivery, and customer experience. Drive team performance and collaboration to strengthen relationships with both internal and external stakeholders. Lead and inspire team leads to create and execute strategic plans aligned with their respective functions and targets. Provide regular reports and strategic recommendations to the leadership team. Identify and implement business improvements that enhance cost-efficiency and operational effectiveness. Clearly communicate the company’s value propositions and ensure alignment with organizational processes. Proactively assess and address challenges, ensuring timely resolution of issues impacting operations or strategy. Lead and support change initiatives that foster innovation and continuous improvement across the organization. Promote a culture of compliance, accountability, and ongoing process enhancement. Align with the Director Sales on all customer-related topics and ensure stable load from the market. YOUR PROFILE Degree in Engineering, Manufacturing, Service Operations, Business, or a related field; Master’s preferred. Strong background in operations management within manufacturing, ideally in the aviation industry. Demonstrated success in managing cross-functional teams with strong leadership and mentoring skills. Strong understanding of engineering and industrial production processes. Experience working in SMEs and matrix organizations. International business exposure with cultural awareness and adaptability. Expertise in project management, productivity improvement, and strategic planning. Exceptional communication, negotiation, and presentation abilities; confident at executive level. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; thrives under pressure. High-level organizational and decision-making capabilities. Represents the company at events and maintains a strong public profile. YOUR CONTACT Daniel Geiger Vice President Human Resources HYDRO Systems GmbH & Co. KG Ahfeldstraße 10 ▪ 77781 Biberach / Baden rhaero.com

review.title: Managing Director, UAE
review.jd_text: As a global leader in digital, compliance-led collections, InDebted partners with the world’s most innovative enterprises to modernise recovery, protect brand equity, and transform the customer experience. We are now bringing that model to the UAE through a new joint venture anchored by ADCB — and we are hiring a Managing Director to lead and scale our presence in one of our most important new markets. This is a senior, high-impact leadership role responsible for owning the UAE P&L, driving enterprise growth across banks/telcos/utilities/BNPLs, and establishing InDebted as the region’s benchmark for compliant, digital-first collections. About The Role The Managing Director (UAE) is the senior-most leadership position for the market, accountable for commercial growth, operational performance, regulatory alignment, and long-term client relationships. You will lead the UAE go-to-market strategy, spearhead expansion beyond ADCB, and ensure we execute a relationship-driven enterprise entry model suited to the UAE market’s dynamics. You will build, lead, and manage a small but high-performing local team — including hiring and managing the Business Development Lead — while working closely with global product, compliance, operations, and executive leadership. What You’ll Do Define and execute the UAE market strategy, calibrated for a traditional-industry client mix and longer enterprise procurement cycles. Own full P&L responsibility for the UAE market, including revenue, costs, and profitability targets. Accelerate growth through deep relationships across banks, telcos, utilities, BNPLs, and other regulated lenders. Serve as the senior enterprise face of InDebted in the region — building trust with C-level leaders, regulators, and strategic partners. Lead development of a high-quality commercial pipeline beyond ADCB through your existing network, targeted enterprise outreach, and relationship-based selling. Oversee the activation, onboarding, and performance of ADCB as the anchor client, ensuring strong delivery, compliance, and satisfaction. Hire, develop, and manage the local BD Lead and future UAE team members. Ensure regulatory alignment across data sovereignty, digital collections standards, and client-specific compliance requirements. Partner with global product and operations to ensure seamless service delivery and continuous improvement for UAE clients. Report market insights, commercial progress, pipeline health, forecast performance, and operational KPIs to global leadership and JV stakeholders. What You'll Need 10+ years of leadership experience in collections, financial services, BNPL, telco credit, or enterprise B2B environments in the UAE. Demonstrated success in selling and delivering enterprise services to banks, telcos, or other regulated institutions.A strong, established network across senior credit, collections, risk, and operations leaders in the UAE — essential for accelerating early pipeline.
